title: Soap Dispensing Washing Up Scrubber – Plastic Handle with Attached Sponge & Scouring Pad, Easy Liquid Dispensing for Effortless Dishwashing, Handheld Scrubber for Kitchen Cleaning
features: Effortless Dishwashing with Soap Dispensing Feature: This Soap Dispensing Washing Up Scrubber makes washing dishes simple and easy. With a built-in soap dispenser, you can fill the scrubber with your favorite dishwashing liquid, which is then dispensed as you scrub, reducing the need to apply soap manually. This feature keeps your hands clean while ensuring effective cleaning for all your kitchenware.

Durable Construction with Plastic and Sponge: Constructed from durable plastic and featuring a tough scouring pad, this scrubber is built to last and can handle even the toughest grease and stains. The plastic handle is ergonomically designed for comfort and grip, allowing you to clean with ease. The high-quality sponge ensures effective cleaning without scratching or damaging surfaces.

Ideal for All Kitchen Cleaning Needs: Whether you're washing plates, pots, pans, or other kitchen utensils, this Soap Dispensing Washing Up Scrubber is the perfect solution. The combination of a sponge and scouring pad makes it versatile enough for both delicate and tough cleaning jobs. It’s great for everyday use and ideal for tackling stubborn grease and food residue.

Saves Time and Reduces Waste: The soap dispensing mechanism allows you to apply just the right amount of detergent with each scrub, reducing wastage and ensuring efficient use of soap. This makes washing dishes faster and more eco-friendly, as you won’t have to use excess soap or detergent. Keep your kitchen tidy with less effort!

Compact and Convenient Design: With a convenient size of 24cm x 6cm x 8cm, this scrubber is easy to store and handle. The wrap-around card packaging ensures it's protected during shipping, and the lightweight design makes it easy to use for extended periods without straining your hand. Perfect for both small and large dishwashing tasks.
description: Product Description Comfortable Non-Slip Handle Designed for daily use, the ergonomic non-slip grip ensures comfort and control, even when your hands are wet and soapy. Strong Scrubbing Power Equipped with a durable sponge and scouring pad, this scrubber removes stubborn food residue and grease without scratching your cookware. Multipurpose Cleaning Tool Perfect for dishes, pots, pans, and even sinks, this versatile scrubber makes your kitchen cleaning faster, easier, and more effective. Built-In Soap Dispenser for Effortless Cleaning Save time and hassle with the integrated soap dispenser. Just press to release the right amount of liquid and tackle tough grease and stains with ease.
